ignoreCommand: if ! git rev-parse HEAD^ > /dev/null 2>&1; then exit 1; fi; ns=$(git diff HEAD^ HEAD --name-only | grep -vE '^(docs/|.*\.md$|.*\.txt$|\.gitignore$|\.editorconfig$|LICENSE$)' || true); if [ -z "$ns" ]; then echo 'docs/md/txt only commit, skipping deploy'; exit 0; else echo 'non-docs change, deploying'; exit 1; fi
